ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), Is_Cloned__c = FALSE, Planned_Installation_Date__c < (TODAY() + 1), TEXT(POC_Type__c) <> "Virtual Lab", TEXT(POC_Type__c) <> "Web Try and Buy", TEXT(POC_Type__c) <> "Ransomware Recovery Software", TEXT(POC_Type__c) <> "Standard POC : RSC-G" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Date must be > 1 day from Created Date
